message:
Running command: 
# Check what step comes after DRT in the wrapper config flow
cat "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
meta = d.get('meta', {})
flow = meta.get('flow', [])
if flow:
    print('Flow steps:')
    for i, step in enumerate(flow):
        print(f'  {i+1}: {step}')
else:
    print('No explicit flow defined - using default Classic flow')
" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Check step 71 state_out (from previous successful-ish run) ==="
ls -la "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/71-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null | head -15
